mission: CLM 170M Φ score on GPU 700W vs AKD1000 1W, target Pearson r >= 0.85

reasons: dense bf16 vs spike-event ontology mismatch
substrate_mismatch_verdict.chosen_path: T-A surrogate (CLM hidden last-layer -> CNN quantized projection -> CNN2SNN -> AKD1000)
rejected_paths: T-C full transformer spike conversion (NOT_ATTEMPTED, hand-wave)

phi_formulation.substrate_agnostic_basis: representation-level invariant (spike rate-avg projects to dense X for both substrates)
phi_formulation.spike_to_dense_lemma: X_akida[i,d] = (1/T) * sum_t S[t,d], T=200ms vendor inference window

verdict_gate.PASS: Pearson r(phi_k_gpu, phi_k_akida) >= 0.85 AND |Phi*_gpu - Phi*_akida| / max(|Phi*_gpu|,|Phi*_akida|,1e-3) <= 0.30
verdict_gate.surrogate_fidelity_sanity: native bf16 vs CNN-surrogate-GPU r >= 0.95 AND magnitude divergence <= 0.10 (gate must PASS before substrate compare)

d0_protocol_steps: 5. AKD1000 inference 16 prompts x T=200ms x 40 reps -> spike tensor S_akida -> X_akida
new_hexa_tools_required: tool/clm_170m_to_metatf_surrogate.hexa (D+0 critical, CLM hidden -> Keras CNN quantized projection)
tool/akida_clm_surrogate_infer.hexa (D+0 critical, AKD1000 inference + spike-rate avg)
tool/n3_phi_cross_substrate_corr.hexa (D+0 critical, Pearson r + verdict gate)

cost_estimate_d0_usd.estimate_basis: H100 spot $2.40/hr (vast.ai avg), Pilot-T1 v3 launcher hardening assumed

sound: surrogate fidelity sanity gate (r>=0.95) before cross-substrate compare
cost estimate lower-bound with explicit basis
hand_wave: Only last-layer projection cross-substrate (not full transformer); 'partial Putnam' explicitly labeled
T-A surrogate fidelity r>=0.95 assumed (not measured pre-arrival)
spike rate-avg loses spike-timing info (T=200ms simple mean)
MetaTF CNN2SNN quantize loss unmeasured pre-arrival
K=8 partition statistical power moderate (~70 effective samples)
AKD1000 ~1W is vendor typical, not anima workload measured
explicitly_not_in_scope: IIT 4.0 strict phi_max over MIPs (NP-hard, surrogate via anima_phi_v3)

blockers_summary: AKD1000 dev kit not yet arrived (ordered 2026-04-29)
training/config/clm_170m.json missing (must create from clm_1b_config.json template)
3 new HEXA tools required (D+0 critical-path emit)
MetaTF SDK install on RPi5 pending hardware arrival
Surrogate fidelity (T-A) unmeasured -- gate at sec 4.3 may fail and abort N-3
